document_api_meta.title: Get Decision Eligibility
document_api_meta.env_desc: Use this API to check eligible decision for an return or cancellation, including whether the seller can approve, reject, direct_refund a specific return or cancellation request, this api also can response available reject reason when seller can execute reject decisio

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: return_or_cancel_id
request_query_param.desc: The unique identifier for an order return or cancellation.

request_query_param.name: check_decisions
request_query_param.desc:
Which return or cancellation decision you want to query.
- APPROVE_REQUEST_CANCEL
- APPROVE_REFUND
- APPROVE_RETURN
- APPROVE_RECEIVED_PACKAGE
- APPROVE_REPLACEMENT
- ISSUE_REPLACEMENT_REFUND
- DIRECT_REFUND
- REJECT_REQUEST_CANCEL
- REJECT_REFUND
- REJECT_RETURN
- REJECT_RECEIVED_PACKAGE
- REJECT_REPLACEMENT

request_query_param.name: locale
request_query_param.desc:
The BCP-47 locale codes for displaying the return reason, delimited by commas. Default: en-US
Refer to [Locale codes](678e3a47bae28f030a8c7523) for the list of supported locale codes.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^decision
response_param.desc:
Which return or cancellation decision you want to query.
- APPROVE_REQUEST_CANCEL
- APPROVE_REFUND
- APPROVE_RETURN
- APPROVE_RECEIVED_PACKAGE
- APPROVE_REPLACEMENT
- ISSUE_REPLACEMENT_REFUND
- DIRECT_REFUND
- REJECT_REQUEST_CANCEL
- REJECT_REFUND
- REJECT_RETURN
- REJECT_RECEIVED_PACKAGE
- REJECT_REPLACEMENT

response_param.name: ^^eligible
response_param.desc:
Use this field to recognize whether an decision is eligible for an return or cancellation:
- TRUE
- FALSE

response_param.name: ^^ineligible_code
response_param.desc: The reason code for an ineligible decision.

response_param.name: ^^ineligible_reason
response_param.example: the return is already completed, you can't approve again.
response_param.desc: The reason for an ineligible decision.

response_param.name: ^^available_reject_reasons
response_param.desc: The reject reason name seller can used to reject buyer's return or cancellation request.

response_param.name: ^^^name
response_param.desc: The reject reason name seller can used to reject buyer's return or cancellation request.

response_param.name: ^^^text
response_param.example: Product shipped. Tracking updates will be available soon.
response_param.desc: The reject reason text seller can used to reject buyer's return or cancellation request.

document_api_meta.response_body: {"code":0,"data":{"decisions":[{"decision":"APPROVE_REFUND","eligible":true,"ineligible_code":25001001,"ineligible_reason":"the return is already completed, you can't approve again.","available_reject_reasons":[{"name":"seller_reject_apply_product_has_been_packed","text":"Product shipped. Tracking updates will be available soon."}]}]},"message":"Success","request_id":"202203070749000101890810281E8C70B7"}

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: The Partner will be able to manage seller's return and refund requests.
scope_list.auth_info: The Partner will be able to manage your return and refund requests.
